headline: Dan Loeb Dumps Microsoft, Slashes Nvidia And Rail Stocks In Sweeping Q1 Portfolio Overhaul
summary: Daniel Loeb's Third Point added Meta, Alphabet, Broadcom, and semiconductor names while sharply cutting Nvidia and Microsoft positions in Q1.
